# Mirrored Benchopt SLOPE Solvers

These files are exact copies from:
- Repository: https://github.com/benchopt/benchmark_slope
- Path: `solvers/`
- Branch: `main`
- Commit: `8d1d9718d4d4fde6a5a349457868dae5f63cbec8`
- Synced on: 2026-04-22

Mirrored files:
- `admm.py`
- `python_pgd.py`
- `skglm.py`
- `sortedl1.py`
- `newt_alm.py`

In this repo, active benchmark solver files under
`benchmarks/benchmark_oscar/solvers/` for the same names are replaced with
these exact mirrored versions.
